name: tdd-sqlite-migrations
description: TDD for SQLite migrations: write tests first that verify table existence, insert/query operations, and foreign key relationships. Tests must insert parent records before child records when FK constraints exist.

content: SQLite schema migrations use versioned MIGRATIONS list with (version, sql) tuples. Migration 2 adds lessons table with category and pattern indexes for efficient querying.

name: upsert-with-conflict-resolution
description: Store upsert methods use INSERT...ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE pattern with COALESCE to preserve existing values on update (e.g., created_at=COALESCE(excluded.created_at, runs.created_at))

name: queue-methods
description: Store queue methods: insert_queued_run, fetch_queued_runs, fetch_active_runs, update_run_state provide run queue management with state filtering and oldest-first ordering

name: queue-methods
description: Store queue methods: insert_queued_run inserts with state='queued', fetch_queued_runs returns oldest-first, fetch_active_runs filters to planning/executing/reviewing/merging, update_run_state updates state with optional completed_at.
